# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http_80
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                use_remote_address: true
                xff_num_trusted_hops: 1
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                path_with_escaped_slashes_action: UNESCAPE_AND_REDIRECT
                common_http_protocol_options:
                  idle_timeout: 300s
                  max_connection_duration: 0s
                http2_protocol_options: {}
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_gateway
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/"
                          route:
                            cluster: svc_api_v1
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,reset-before-request,resource-exhausted,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              retriable_status_codes: [502, 503, 504]
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v2/"
                          route:
                            cluster: svc_api_v2
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,reset-before-request,resource-exhausted,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              retriable_status_codes: [502, 503, 504]
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/auth/"
                          route:
                            cluster: svc_auth
                            timeout: 15s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,reset-before-request,resource-exhausted,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 3s
                              retriable_status_codes: [502, 503, 504]
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: svc_default
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,reset-before-request,resource-exhausted,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              retriable_status_codes: [502, 503, 504]
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: svc_api_v1
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: svc_api_v1
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: api-v1.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1000
            max_pending_requests: 1000
            max_requests: 5000
            max_retries: 3
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive: {}
      upstream_http_protocol_options:
        auto_sni: true
        auto_san_validation: false
      http_protocol_options: {}
      upstream_config:
        name: envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299

    - name: svc_api_v2
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: svc_api_v2
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:

        tcp_keepalive: {}
      upstream_http_protocol_options:
        auto_sni: true
        auto_san_validation: false
      http_protocol_options: {}
      upstream_config:
        name: envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:

          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2

                end: 299

    - name: svc_auth
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY

      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: svc_auth
        endpoints:

              - endpoint:
                  address:

                      address: auth.default.svc.cluster.local

      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: svc_default
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: default-backend.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:

            max_connections: 500

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/stdout
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
